title: eulophia exaltata
intro: Eulophia exaltata, also known as the 'Exaltation Orchid', is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eulophia exaltata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-parasitic agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for its purported aphrodisiac properties.
